symptom_description: Scroll chiller locked out on false high discharge temperature alarm (`sensor reading 155°C` while actual pipe temp is `72°C`). Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on TOWER-302.
root_cause: Vibration chafing of sensor shielded wiring harness against chiller steel frame caused intermittent ground fault on sensor loop.
action_taken: Installed new return water temperature sensor assembly, cleaned microprocessor board edge connectors with contact cleaner, and tested staging.
parts_used: Water Temperature Sensor Assembly, Electronic Contact Cleaner Spray

symptom_description: Scroll compressor amp draw fluctuating erratically (`173` Amps). Chiller failing to pull down process loop temperature (`drastic` deficit). Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to TOWER-302.
root_cause: Prolonged operation with marginal oil return caused metal-to-metal scoring between orbiting and fixed scroll wraps.
action_taken: Recovered refrigerant circuit B, cut out worn scroll compressor, brazed in exact replacement scroll compressor assembly, replaced liquid line drier, evacuated to 400 microns, and weighed in R-410A charge.
parts_used: Scroll Compressor Replacement Assembly, Suction Accumulator Vessel, Filter Drier Element, R-410A (28 lbs)

symptom_description: Scroll compressor making loud abnormal metallic rattling and buzzing/humming sound (`0.44` in/sec RMS on frame). Compressor drawing `marked` low amps (`45%` FLA).
root_cause: Reverse rotation event caused by incorrect phase sequence during temporary generator power feed damaged scroll involute tips.
action_taken: Replaced scroll compressor assembly, renewed suction accumulator and filter drier, verified crankcase heater continuity, and charged circuit precisely by weight.
parts_used: Scroll Compressor Unit, Phase Monitor Protection Relay, Filter Drier, R-410A Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: High superheat reading (`> 18°C` at compressor suction) and low subcooling (`< 2°C`). Chiller running `100%` capacity but leaving water `101`°C high.
root_cause: Micro-leak at copper U-bend braze joint on air-cooled condenser coil due to continuous fan vibration and thermal cycling.
action_taken: Tightened sight glass and filter drier flare nuts, replaced Schrader valve cores, pulled 12-hour deep vacuum, and recharged circuit A with precise weight of R-410A.
parts_used: R-410A Refrigerant Charge (22 lbs), Liquid Line Filter Drier, Silver Braze Alloy

symptom_description: Scroll compressor amp draw fluctuating erratically (`39` Amps). Chiller failing to pull down process loop temperature (`concerning` deficit). Also inspected TOWER-302 to rule out secondary mechanical strain or electrical feed anomalies.
root_cause: Fatigue fracture of internal Oldham coupling ring inside scroll set due to thousands of thermal/pressure cycles.
action_taken: Replaced failed hermetic scroll compressor unit, renewed crankcase heater and contactor, flushed piping, installed new bi-flow filter drier, and recharged system.
parts_used: Scroll Compressor Unit, Phase Monitor Protection Relay, Filter Drier, R-410A Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: Evaporator pressure transducer reading `35` PSI offset compared to calibrated mechanical manifold gauge. EEV hunting wildly.
root_cause: Corrosion on multi-pin plug connection at chiller microprocessor board resulting from high ambient cabinet humidity.
action_taken: Replaced leaving chilled water NTC thermistor probe, applied thermal paste inside sensor well, and calibrated sensor offset in controller menu.
parts_used: Suction/Discharge Pressure Transducer Kit (0-500 PSI), Sensor Connector Cable Assembly

symptom_description: Chiller controller displaying erratic leaving chilled water temperature (`reading jumps rapidly between 101°C and -15°C`). Unit locked out on freeze protection.
root_cause: Corrosion on multi-pin plug connection at chiller microprocessor board resulting from high ambient cabinet humidity.
action_taken: Replaced leaving chilled water NTC thermistor probe, applied thermal paste inside sensor well, and calibrated sensor offset in controller menu.
parts_used: Water Temperature Sensor Assembly, Electronic Contact Cleaner Spray

symptom_description: Internal discharge temperature trip on scroll compressor (`> 125°C`). Unit making distinct persistent grinding sound during shutdown spindown. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to TOWER-302.
root_cause: Fatigue fracture of internal Oldham coupling ring inside scroll set due to thousands of thermal/pressure cycles.
action_taken: Replaced scroll compressor assembly, renewed suction accumulator and filter drier, verified crankcase heater continuity, and charged circuit precisely by weight.
parts_used: Scroll Compressor Replacement Assembly, Suction Accumulator Vessel, Filter Drier Element, R-410A (28 lbs)

symptom_description: Low refrigerant charge alarm active on scroll chiller controller. Tech noted slight oil residue on condenser header braze joint.
root_cause: Loose flare nut connection on sight glass or filter drier fitting allowing slow loss of R-410A/R-407C over past cooling season.
action_taken: Tightened sight glass and filter drier flare nuts, replaced Schrader valve cores, pulled 12-hour deep vacuum, and recharged circuit A with precise weight of R-410A.
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Seal Caps (4-Pack), R-410A Refrigerant (18 lbs), Flare Gasket Set

symptom_description: Ops reported chiller not loading past `50%` capacity due to faulty return water temperature thermistor reading `noticeable` out of calibration. Unit overdrawing current when TOWER-302 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Corrosion on multi-pin plug connection at chiller microprocessor board resulting from high ambient cabinet humidity.
action_taken: Replaced defective discharge temperature thermistor, repaired chafed sensor wiring harness with heat shrink, and cleared controller lockout.
parts_used: NTC Immersion Thermistor Sensor Probe, Thermal Conductive Paste

symptom_description: Electronic expansion valve (`EEV`) at `100%` open position but evaporator temperature remaining concerning elevated above setpoint. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on TOWER-302.
root_cause: Pinhole corrosion leak on evaporator brazed plate heat exchanger refrigerant channel caused by aggressive local humidity.
action_taken: Located pinhole leak at condenser inlet header using nitrogen/hydrogen tracer gas, brazed joint, renewed filter drier, and recharged system.
parts_used: R-410A Refrigerant Charge (22 lbs), Liquid Line Filter Drier, Silver Braze Alloy

symptom_description: Scroll compressor making loud abnormal metallic rattling and rumbling sound (`0.28` in/sec RMS on frame). Compressor drawing `minor` low amps (`45%` FLA).

action_taken: Replaced scroll compressor assembly, renewed suction accumulator and filter drier, verified crankcase heater continuity, and charged circuit precisely by weight.

action_taken: Performed electronic leak check, located micro-leak at condenser coil U-bend, recovered remaining charge, silver brazed repair, evacuated to 350 microns, and weighed in factory charge of R-410A.

symptom_description: Ops reported chiller not loading past `50%` capacity due to faulty return water temperature thermistor reading `sharp` out of calibration.
root_cause: Calibration drift and internal bridge resistor failure inside high-pressure/low-pressure 4-20mA pressure transducer.
action_taken: Replaced faulty suction and discharge pressure transducers, renewed wiring harness connectors, and verified calibration against digital manifold.
parts_used: High Temperature Thermistor Probe, Heat Shrink Tubing Kit

symptom_description: Ops reported chiller not loading past `50%` capacity due to faulty return water temperature thermistor reading `drastic` out of calibration.

parts_used: High Temperature Thermistor Probe, Heat Shrink Tubing Kit
